one_time_description: Impairment of due from related First Nation entity (23177365 Ontario Limited) - full allowance recorded due to uncertainty of collection
economic_notes: BBH Limited Partnership (49.5% interest) provides personnel and equipment rentals to economic projects. Musselwhite Mine revenue recognized. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership gaming revenue. Chee-Kee-Sis Petro Inc. operates diesel generator and fuel hauling. Wunnumin Lake Community Telecommunications Corporation operates internet, cable TV and mobility. Wunnumin Lake Small Business Centre handles property management.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 - auditor report signed September 7, 2023 (over 2 years late). Consolidated entities include: CMHC Housing Project, Mishamikiwiish Akiw Otabitamaageg, Chee-Kee-Sis Petro Inc., Wunnumin Lake Community Telecommunications Corporation, Wunnumin Lake Small Business Centre. BBH Limited Partnership accounted for using modified equity method (49.5% interest). Large deferred revenue balance of $21.67M (ISC capital project funding). Significant drop in revenue from 2020 ($49.18M) to 2021 ($30.44M) primarily due to deferred revenue timing. Impairment of $1,131,839 on due from 23177365 Ontario Limited. First Nation not in compliance with CMHC replacement reserve requirements. current_liabilities includes accounts payable $7,880,171 + due to Government of Canada $46,132 + due to related First Nation entity $57,242. long_term_debt includes term loan $5,087,580 + capital lease obligations $316,071.
